description: Refactor RAG configuration and CLI to be provider-agnostic, removing hardcoded OpenAI/Anthropic dependencies and enabling future local model integration
goal: Make RAG system accept any LLM provider through generic interface, preparing for Ollama and Claude CLI integration without hardcoded API-key dependencies
requirements: Make RAGConfig provider field accept any string with runtime validation
Add getEmbeddingDimensions() method to LLMProvider interface
Refactor rag-config.ts to remove hardcoded 'openai' | 'anthropic' types
Update rag-index.ts CLI to support --provider flag with any value
Make vector store dimension configurable per-provider (1536/768/384)
Update CLI help text to indicate provider flexibility

success_criteria.backwards_compatible: Existing OpenAI/Anthropic flows still work unchanged
success_criteria.cli_ready: --provider flag accepts any string, validates at runtime
success_criteria.config_flexibility: RAGConfig accepts any provider string with validator function
success_criteria.dimension_handling: Embedding dimensions read from provider, not hardcoded
